allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "HOME: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "HOME ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/tamu-undangan-x7k2" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "INVITE: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "INVITE ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/admin/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "LOGIN: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "LOGIN ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/admin" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30 -MaximumRedirection 0; "ADMIN: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "ADMIN: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/settings" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "API SETTINGS: $\($r.StatusCode\) - $\($r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(150, $r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { "API SETTINGS ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/photos" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "API PHOTOS: $\($r.StatusCode\) - len $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "API PHOTOS ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/guests" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "GUESTS: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "GUESTS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) \(expected 401\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/wishes" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "WISHES: $\($r.StatusCode\) - len $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "WISHES ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/settings" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "API SETTINGS: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "API SETTINGS ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/tamu-undangan-x7k2" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "INVITE: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "INVITE ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
